/CAL: SENTENCING/JAVS/INTRW/TWS/CH2:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 20D/CTS: 1/4019HALF/SWAPD: 03-13-20/PF460 18/DDP2/LVAL/LCHEM/IID:1/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/PC/COA:40/ICNA/OR25/EMAT/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X: PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 101 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X: VC 23593(A) ADMONITION GIVEN,/

/CAL: DISPOSITION/JAVS/INTRW/X: THE DEFENDANT ADMITS A 06-11-15 PRIOR MISDEMEANOR CONVICTION FOR 23152 VC OUT OF SAN MATEO COUNTY,/TEXT:DEFT ADV &PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 2/DISM3/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR AND REQUEST FOR DISCOVERY,/GTWM/987,2/X: MVARS PROTECTIVE ORDER FILED/OR/CTORD: AS A CONDITION OF O,R,DEFENDANT TO ATTEND 2 AA PER WEEK AND TO NOT DRIVE/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/SB: 2 HOURS WITH PROOF OF 2 AA PER WEEK/
/CAL: CHANGE OF PLEA/X:CAUSE IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 21, FORTHWITH; TO BE HEARD BEFORE JUDGE DEKREON, FOR DISPOSITION/
/CAL: PRE-TRIAL CONFERENCE/CONTD: SET OR DISPO/SB: 2 HOURS WITH PROOF OF 2AA PER WEEK/
/CAL: PRE-TRIAL CONFERENCE/X: COURT CLARIFIES DEFENDANT TO DO 2 AA PER WEEK/CONT/DEF: APPEARANCE WAIVED WITH PROOF OF 2 AA PER WEEK/
/CAL:PRETRIAL/CONT/X:2 HOUR STANDBY WITH PROOF OF 2 AA PER WEEK/
